strengths: 20+ years full-stack experience with strong current alignment: TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq directly match role requirements
Demonstrated staff-level architecture and design skills; built complex production systems (GISCollective, optimization platforms) and contributed to mission-critical infrastructure at scale
Consistent emphasis on code quality, TDD, and craftsmanship; organized refactoring dojos and testing workshops, reflecting problem-solving focus and knowledge-sharing mindset
concerns: React expertise not evident; extensive Ember.js background suggests different frontend paradigm and potential ramp-up needed on primary stack
Specific testing framework experience (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not mentioned; while TDD commitment is clear, framework proficiency remains unclear
Enterprise Kubernetes maturity appears limited; AWS CDK mentioned but Kubernetes only referenced in open-source context, not proven at production enterprise scale
response.justification: Szabo is an exceptionally experienced full-stack engineer with 20+ years of diverse background and demonstrated staff-level thinking. Current role directly involves TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure—core requirements. However, the resume shows no React experience (only Ember.js), lacks specific testing framework details despite strong quality culture, and shows limited evidence of enterprise-scale Kubernetes work. The Ember.js→React transition is learnable but represents real onboarding friction; overall a strong senior engineer with relevant current work but notable framework and tooling gaps.
